hero.description: Crafting performant, beautiful digital experiences with modern web technologies. Turning complex problems into elegant solutions.

about.bio1: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with <highlight>5+ years of experience</highlight> building scalable web applications. I specialize in React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure — creating products that users love.
about.bio2: My approach combines clean code with thoughtful UX. I believe great software isn't just functional — it should feel intuitive and delightful. From startups to enterprise, I've helped teams ship products that make an impact.
about.bio3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring open-source projects, writing technical articles, or mentoring junior developers in the community.

experience.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
experience.description: Led development of payment dashboard serving 10M+ merchants. Reduced load time by 60%.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Built Next.js deployment infrastructure and contributed to open-source tooling used by 1M+ devs.

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Built real-time collaboration features in the core editor. Shipped the Comments redesign.

projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've shipped — from side experiments to production systems serving millions of users.

items.title: SaaS Analytics Platform
items.description: Real-time analytics dashboard for e-commerce. Processes events at massive scale with sub-100ms query latency. Built with Next.js, ClickHouse, and Redis.

items.title: Auth Kit
items.description: Drop-in authentication library with 15+ providers, built for any Node.js stack.

items.title: FinTrack Dashboard
items.description: Personal finance tracker with AI-powered categorization and forecast charts.

items.title: DevPulse
items.description: GitHub activity monitor with smart digest notifications. Available on iOS & Android.

items.title: Codebase AI
items.description: AI code review assistant integrated into CI pipelines. Cuts PR review time significantly.

items.quote: Working with Alex was a game-changer for our product. He didn't just write code — he thought about the business, challenged our assumptions, and delivered something we're genuinely proud of. Rare to find someone who can do architecture, mobile, and backend all at a senior level.

Alex took ownership of our mobile app from day one. He set up the architecture, handled code reviews, kept the team aligned, and shipped on time. Beyond technical skill, he communicates clearly and keeps the bigger picture in mind. Exactly what you need in a tech lead.

engagement.footerText: Not sure which fits? Start with a discovery call — we'll figure it out together.

cards.title: MVP & Fast Builds
cards.body: This website was built in days using AI-assisted development. That's the pace I bring to your project — a working solution in weeks, not months, without the overhead of a full agency process.
cards.bestFor: Founders who need to validate an idea, test a market, or ship something real before committing to a full build.
cards.note: Focused scope, no bureaucracy — shipped in weeks, not months.

cards.title: Full Product Build & Support
cards.body: Solid architecture from day one, built to scale. I'm embedded in your product long-term — designing, building, leading, and evolving it as your business grows.
cards.bestFor: Clients building something serious who want one technical partner for the long haul — not a series of handoffs.
cards.note: One partner. Full ownership. Zero handoffs.

cards.title: Project SOS
cards.body: You have an existing product — but it's messy, slow, or needs a senior hand. I come in, review the codebase and architecture, scope what needs fixing, and take ownership of moving it forward.
cards.bestFor: Teams with technical debt, founders who inherited a codebase, or products that need stabilising before the next growth phase.
cards.note: Rescue, refactor, and scale — without starting over.

fit.quote: I work best with clients who are decisive about what they're building and trust their engineer to figure out how.
goodFit: Founders building a product from scratch
Teams that need a tech lead to own architecture
Greenfield projects where decisions still matter
Mobile + web + backend in one engagement
notFit: Projects requiring work in an existing non-JavaScript backend
Projects without a clear owner on the client side

contact.heading: Let's build something {gradient} together.
contact.subheading: Whether you have a product idea, need a technical partner, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.
contact.availabilityBody: Currently available for freelance projects, consulting, and full-time roles starting Q2 2026.

form.successMessage: Message sent! I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

mentorship.heading: Build real. Ship fast. Get hired.
mentorship.body: Production-grade full-stack development — TypeScript, NestJS, Next.js, React Native. You leave with working software and a GitHub repo that proves it.
